section_miscategorizations.text: Continue metformin 500 milligrams twice a day.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This could be interpreted as either a continuation order (plan) or a statement of current therapy. The wording does not clearly indicate a new or adjusted order, so it is somewhat ambiguous, but placing it in P is not clearly misleading.

Similar to the prior line, this is ambiguously phrased and could represent ongoing therapy rather than a discrete new management action. However, it is framed as a recommendation, so placement in P is acceptable though slightly organizationally unclear.
